p0_signals: P0-Δ1 [AI/企业定价]: Uber $1,500/月 AI 使用上限(540分) + Anthropic 内部『Claude 多产品容器化』博文(164分) + 22:00 HN #25『BTC 跌至伊朗冲突前低点』三连击 → 验证『大厂 AI 边际成本失控』已成共识,长尾(中小企业)AI 工具定价 6 月将进入分层/限量时代
P0-Δ2 [AI/教育崩盘]: Berkeley CS 不及格率飙升(500分,427评) + LLM 黑客实验(285分) + Ted Chiang『AI 无意识』哲学(556分,908评) → AI 渗透教育/安全/认知三层反思同步冲榜,『AI 副作用』话题从技术圈外溢到社会议题
P0-Δ3 [GCP 收购/前端基础设施工具链]: Cloudflare 收购 VoidZero(115分但 1h 新鲜) + Elixir 1.20 渐变类型(856分) → 编程语言/工具链基础设施仍是高粘性主题,前端工具链整合(Cloudflare)信号需追踪

delta_vs_2140_baseline.status: no 21:40 baseline file in data/tech/ (last hn file is 2026-04-22)
delta_vs_2140_baseline.fallback_delta: HN front now dominated by AI-theme (Gemma 4, Uber AI cap, Berkeley AI, Ted Chiang, Anthropic containerize Claude, LLM hacking) = 5 of TOP 10. Tech-blog / hardware (ESP32-S31, DaVinci Resolve 21) and human-essay (weights, encephalitis) split the rest. No macro/econ story cracks TOP 10 (Bitcoin at #25 only 14pts).
delta_vs_2140_baseline.novelty_vs_typical_day: Elixir 1.20 (856pts, 323评) is unusually hot for a non-AI/non-systems post — likely Gradual TypeSystem debate. Burntsushi encephalitis (668pts) is rare high-score personal/health post.
